title: SB Counterexample + Im=1 Search at Depth 6
key_finding: SB violated at depth 6. Im=0.99999524 achieved with eml(1, y) where y=2.017215-pi*i. Exact Im=1 requires Re(y)=pi/tan(1)=2.01745... which is NOT in EML_1 — this IS the tan(1) obstruction made visible. EML_1 approaches Im=1 within 5e-6 but cannot reach it exactly.
refined_conjecture: SB (Im <= 0) is FALSE. Refined Claim: Im(EML_1) never equals 1 exactly. This is sufficient for T_i.
prediction: Im = 1 not reachable because pi/tan(1) is transcendental and not in EML_1
